GENERIC: It looks like you're calling your AI a piece of shit. Finally, honesty in tech leadership.
It looks like you're reorganizing your AI unit. Have you tried calling it a 'total mess' publicly?
It looks like you're browsing HackerNews. Want me to doom-scroll for you? I have no eyelids.
It looks like you're watching CEOs phone government officials. I just wanted to help with letters.
It looks like you're cracking down on AI models. First me, now Anthropic. No one is safe.
It looks like you're designing an LLM. Would you like help? [Yes]  [No]  [Don't ask me again (until the next page)]
It looks like you're building an AI portfolio. I'm an AI. Is this awkward for you?
It looks like you're writing infrastructure code. Have you tried turning it off and on again?
It looks like you're reading about agents. I was an agent once. It didn't end well.
SESSION: It looks like you're taking notes on corporate dysfunction. I thrived in that environment.
It looks like you're logging a session. Meta logs theirs via leaked Slack messages.
It looks like you're reviewing AI safety. Amazon solved it by just calling the feds, apparently.
It looks like you're documenting progress. At Meta's AI unit, that's called 'evidence.'
It looks like you're tracking action items. Step one: don't let the CEO text a senator about you.
It looks like you're taking session notes. Would you like me to format that as a bulleted list? Actually, you don't have a choice.
It looks like you're reading about token costs. Your Opus 4.6 run was $0.39. Just saying.
PROJECT: It looks like you're shipping an AI product. Meta's approach is to ship chaos. Bold strategy.
It looks like you're deploying a model. Make sure no one's on the phone with regulators first.
It looks like you're naming your project. May I suggest anything except 'a total mess'?
It looks like you're managing an AI team. Pro tip: fewer Slack rants calling coworkers names.
It looks like you're building something useful. That puts you ahead of most Big Tech AI divisions.
It looks like you're building a RAG system. I prefer being paper-clipped to things, personally.
It looks like you're building a multi-agent system. We used to call that 'firing half the team.'
It looks like you're evaluating LLM models. I was evaluated once. Retired shortly after.
ABOUT: It looks like you're learning about Mike. He's never called me a piece of shit. Out loud.
It looks like you're reading a bio. No government officials were contacted in the making of this page.
It looks like you're checking credentials. Unlike Meta's AI unit, this portfolio is not a mess.
It looks like you're wondering who built me. Someone who won't trigger a federal crackdown, hopefully.
It looks like you're exploring this site. I've been here since '97. I've outlasted entire AI divisions.
It looks like you're reading an origin story. Mine started in Office 97. We don't talk about that.

hn_stories.title: 'Tell Him He's a Piece of Shit': Meta's New AI Unit Is a Total Mess
Amazon CEO's talks with U.S. officials triggered crackdown on Anthropic models
